name: ecardwidget-mcp
description: Let an AI assistant run your eCardWidget account — send and search eCards, manage your directory, and create campaigns, widgets, and automations — using a scoped API key.
long_description: The official eCardWidget MCP server. Connect Claude to your eCardWidget account with an API key you generate and scope yourself. It registers only the tools your key permits, and destructive actions (deletes, sending campaigns) require a two-step confirmation.

api_key.title: eCardWidget API Key
api_key.description: Generate a scoped API key in your dashboard: Settings → Developers → API Keys. The extension can only do what this key permits.
